summary: Senior ETL/Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise experience building reliable data pipelines, advanced SQL reporting layers, Unix/Linux automation, and production data platforms. Strong background in Python, SQL, Oracle, AWS Glue/S3/Redshift, PySpark, data warehousing, dimensional modeling, data quality, performance tuning, and operational troubleshooting. Experienced collaborating with business partners, analysts, architects, and engineering teams to document workflows, improve batch processes, and deliver production-ready data solutions.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected and supported automated Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, replacing manual reporting processes with repeatable data workflows.
Designed historical Oracle schemas, SQL reporting structures, and retention patterns to support capacity forecasting, operational analytics, and executive-level reporting.
Built hybrid AWS/Oracle data platform components using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue ETL, Redshift, and Python processing for large-scale telemetry and forecasting workloads.
Performed SQL optimization, data validation, reconciliation, and production troubleshooting to improve reliability and consistency across monitoring, capacity, and reporting datasets.
Collaborated with product, infrastructure, analytics, and business stakeholders to translate operational requirements into documented data workflows, dashboards, and reporting outputs.
Improved operational readiness through automation, runbooks, monitoring feeds, and issue-resolution workflows across enterprise banking infrastructure.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Data-mined real-user and synthetic monitoring datasets from Dynatrace AppMon and Gomez Synthetic Monitoring to surface performance optimization recommendations for critical hospitality systems.
Built analytics and reporting views that converted raw performance telemetry into actionable engineering insights for Brand.com and other revenue-impacting platforms.
Documented monitoring workflows, cutover procedures, and feature changes during Dynatrace 6.5 to 7.0 upgrade and TLS 1.2 migration with no production monitoring regression.
Worked with engineering and operations teams to troubleshoot production issues using transaction tracing, dashboards, and performance data.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Built Perl and Korn Shell data-extraction scripts that automated performance reporting and reduced reliance on manual weekly exports.
Designed enterprise dashboards, alerts, SLA thresholds, and reporting modules across large-scale CA APM environments with thousands of instrumented agents.
Led upgrades and operational improvements across 50+ Enterprise Managers while coordinating with cross-functional infrastructure, application, and support teams.
Produced technical documentation, onboarding guidance, and client training materials used by internal teams and customer stakeholders.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster while preserving data integrity and transaction performance.
Optimized SQL and C++/OCCI transaction processing, reducing physical hardware footprint by 95% while maintaining sub-second query latency.
Built validation and test automation to compare migration outputs across large transaction datasets during phased cutover.
Automated schema conversion and data validation routines to support reliable database migration and production readiness.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, PL/SQL, Perl, Korn Shell / Ksh, C++, Java, XML, JSON
skills.ETL & Data Engineering: ETL/ELT pipelines, batch processing, data migration, data validation, reconciliation, data quality, pipeline troubleshooting, production data workflows
skills.Databases & Warehousing: Oracle, Oracle RAC, Redshift, MySQL, PostgreSQL, data warehousing, star schema, fact/dimension modeling, dimensional modeling, MPP database concepts
skills.Query & Performance: Advanced SQL, query optimization, SQL performance tuning, partitioning concepts, historical retention design, workload optimization, data integrity checks
skills.Cloud & Big Data: AWS S3, AWS Glue, Amazon Redshift, Athena, PySpark, Apache Spark, Hadoop/Hive, Parquet, serverless data platform concepts
skills.Unix / Scheduling / Operations: Unix/Linux, shell scripting, batch job monitoring, production troubleshooting, runbooks, incident support, Agile/Scrum, CI/CD concepts, testing, code review, documentation
skills.Tools & Analytics: Dynatrace AppMon, Gomez Synthetic Monitoring, CA APM, BMC TrueSight, AppDynamics, Streamlit, matplotlib, plotly, Git, Docker, Airflow

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a Python/PySpark forecasting and analytics pipeline that transformed enterprise telemetry into capacity insights, replacing manual forecasting cycles with automated data preparation, modeling, and Streamlit reporting.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless data platform pattern using S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, Parquet, and PySpark concepts for scalable ingestion, transformation, query optimization, and analytics workloads.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built a Python automation pipeline with semantic duplicate detection, structured JSON generation, quality gates, and application tracking, emphasizing reproducible data contracts and workflow documentation.
